problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to without, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
